abilities.effect: When you play this Pokémon from your hand onto your Bench during your turn, you may switch it with your Active Pokémon. If you do, you may move any amount of Energy from your other Pokémon to this Pokémon.
abilities.name: Rapid Vernier

attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.
attacks.name: Prism Edge

abilities.effect: Attacks used by this Pokémon cost {C} less for each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.
abilities.name: Hustle Play

attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned.
attacks.name: Blaze Blast

attacks.effect: This Pokémon can't use Blaze Blitz again until it leaves the Active Spot.
attacks.name: Blaze Blitz

abilities.effect: Damage from attacks used by this Pokémon isn't affected by any effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.
abilities.name: Azure Seas

attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is affected by a Special Condition, this attack does 120 more damage.
attacks.name: Catharsis Roar

attacks.effect: Discard up to 3 Energy cards from your hand. This attack does 60 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon for each Energy card you discarded in this way. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)
attacks.name: Tricolor Pump

attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.
attacks.name: Numbing Hold

abilities.effect: Attacks used by your Future Pokémon, except any Iron Crown ex, do 20 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).
abilities.name: Cobalt Command

attacks.effect: This attack does 50 damage to 2 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness or Resistance, or by any effects on those Pokémon.
attacks.name: Twin Shotels

attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, if this Pokémon is damaged by an attack (even if it is Knocked Out), put 8 damage counters on the Attacking Pokémon.
attacks.name: Repulsor Axe

attacks.effect: Discard 2 Energy from this Pokémon.
attacks.name: Power Stomp

abilities.effect: Whenever your opponent attaches an Energy card from their hand to 1 of their Pokémon, put 2 damage counters on that Pokémon.
abilities.name: Gnawing Curse

attacks.effect: You may move an Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon to 1 of their Benched Pokémon.
attacks.name: Tricky Steps

abilities.effect: Prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks from your opponent's Basic Pokémon ex.
abilities.name: Armor Tail

attacks.effect: This attack also does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)
attacks.name: Dirty Beam

attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes 50 less damage from attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).
attacks.name: Steel Wing

attacks.effect: Discard up to 2 {M} Energy from this Pokémon. This attack does 120 damage for each card you discarded in this way.
attacks.name: Cross Breaker

attacks.effect: Discard your hand and draw 6 cards.
attacks.name: Burst Roar

attacks.effect: You may discard any amount of Basic Energy from your Pokémon. This attack does 70 damage for each card you discarded in this way.
attacks.name: Bellowing Thunder

cards.effect: Heal all damage from 1 of your Pokémon that has 30 HP or less remaining.
cards.name: Bianca's Devotion

cards.effect: Search your deck for 2 cards, shuffle your deck, then put those cards on top of it in any order.
cards.name: Ciphermaniac's Codebreaking

cards.effect: Your opponent reveals their hand, and you discard up to 2 Item cards you find there.
cards.name: Eri

cards.effect: Look at the top 6 cards of your deck and put 2 of them into your hand. Discard the other cards.
cards.name: Explorer's Guidance

cards.effect:
You can use this card only if you discard another card from your hand.

cards.effect: Search your deck for a card that has no Abilities and evolves from 1 of your Pokémon, and put it onto that Pokémon to evolve it. Then, shuffle your deck. You can use this card on a Pokémon you put down when you were setting up to play or on a Pokémon that was put into play this turn.
